title: Biodiversity indicators - Canada.ca
content:
## Biodiversity indicators
Biodiversity indicators offer insights into key biodiversity topics, covering wildlife species, sustainable resource use, habitat conservation and more.
- Canadian species index (updated September 2023)
- General status of wild species (updated January 2023)
- Species at risk population trends (updated January 2026)
- Changes in the status of wildlife species at risk (updated January 2026)
- Population status of Canada's migratory birds (updated May 2025)
- Trends in Canada's bird populations (updated May 2025)
- Invasive alien species in Canada (updated December 2024)
- Canada's conserved areas (updated August 2025)
- Global trends in conserved areas (updated July 2023)
- Ecological integrity of national parks (updated October 2025)
- Extent of Canada's wetlands (updated June 2025)
- Ability of the agricultural landscape to support wildlife (updated May 2024)
- Sea ice in Canada (updated February 2025)
- Eelgrass in Canada (new December 2020)
- Restoring the Great Lakes Areas of Concern (updated September 2025)
- Land-use change (new October 2021)

## Sustainable use of natural resources
- Forest management and disturbances (updated December 2025)
- Status of key fish stocks (updated May 2026)
- Harvest levels of key fish stocks (updated May 2026)
Canada's conserved areas

Thank you for your feedback.
